titleStmt.title: SII 18.82: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 82. (B.K. No. 67 of 1933-34.) KOṆṆŪR, NARGUND TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Stone built into the ceiling of the front gate way in the Paramēśvara temple.

summary.p: This inscription, referring itself to the reign of Bhuvanaikamalladēva, gives a description of the military exploits of Lakshmabhūpāḷa, a subordinate of the king. The chief's wife Bhāgaladēvi is highly praised. The genealogy of Māḷabhūpa, the brother-in-law of Lakshmabhūpāḷa is given and it is stated that Māḷaparāja, the grandfather of Māḷabhūpa, obtained certain offices from Satyās11raya (evidently Iṛivābeḍaṅgā Satyās11raya) and continued to hold them during the reign of Jayasiṁha (Jayasiṁha II) and Āhavamalla (Sōmēs11vara I). It is interesting to note that among the offices so obtained by him one related to the regulation etc., of the profession of dancing girls (in temples). The portion of the record, probably containing the date and the details of the grant, is built in.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmadbhuvanaikamalladēvara vijayarājyaA few lines in the beginning are lost.
muttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ saluttamire .
tatpādārādhaka . bavaradoḷāṁpa gūrjjarabhayajvaranuddhatacēra
cōḷikāṁrṇnavabaḍavāgni koṁkaṇabhayaṁkaranā magadhāṁdhragauḍa
māḷavikakuḷādrivajranasahāyaparākramanudghatēja
nāhavajayalīlanūrjjitayaśōnidhi lakṣmaṇamaṇḍalēśvaraṁ . besa
sal śrīrāyadāmōdaranatibaḷanaṁ lakṣmabhūpāḷanaṁ daḷḷise mē
lēḷtarppa cōḷaṁ sevedanagidanā pāṇḍyanaṁ siṁhaḷīka kusidaṁ
mmanaḷḷāḍidanedeyoḍedarkkoṁkaṇādhīśaraṁdhraṁ desegeṭṭaṁ gūrjjaraṁ
cintisidanatibhayabhrāṁtanā māḷavēśa . vanadurgga
vellameyde caṇakakṣētraṁgaḷaṁ śaiḷadurgganikāyaṁgaḷa vaṇni
dhāṁbhōdhi suttiḻdagurvve nisippā jaḷadurggapaṁtiparinīradu
nisalkaṇmuvarārō lakṣmanṛpanaṁ durggatrayadhvaṁsiya
veḍedamarātinṛpacaturaṁgasainyasaṁcāḷaneyiṁda mō
na vājiya pādaghātadiṁ rūḍhisi pogalalladahitargge lalā
ya daṇḍagōpāḷanoḷāṁtu kāduvare kādi barddukuvare mahājiyo
ḷ . Asuhṛdbhūparanājiraṁgadoḷagurvvippannegaṁ kolvaneṁbarsale cō
dyame mēruvaṁ negapalaṁbhōrāsiyaṁ kaṭṭalā sasiyu sūryyanumaṁ
nelakkiḷipaleṇṭuṁ dantiyaṁ pōrisalkī samartthammunidaṁdu lakṣmanṛpa
nēnaṁ māḍanēgayyanō . tanagidirāṁtarātinṛparaṁ tave koṁdesedīge
muyvanāṁpane naralōkadoḷ baḍavarillene koṭṭesaviṁge muyvanāṁpa
ne maṟevokka maṇḍalikaraṁ sale kādesaviṁge muyvanāṁpanī mahimā
spadakke doreyāvano lakṣmaṇamaṇḍaḷēśanoḷ . Ā maṇḍalikaṁ lakṣmaṇa
na bhāme mahāsati viḷāsavati patihite lakṣmīvati bhāgaladēvi
mahāmahimāspadavibhāsiyēṁ kēvaḷamē . taṁde narēśvaraṁge gaja
sāhaṇaverggaḍe muṭṭabhūbhujaṁ sundaramūrtti māḷanṛpanagraja
nīvaradēvanī jagadvanditanappa maṇḍalika lakṣmanṛpaṁ patiyeṁdaḍinna
dēneṁdape bhōgabhāginiya bhāgaladēviya bhāgyadēḷgeya .
manucaritaṁ mahānṛpati lakṣmanṛpaṁ pratipatti muṭṭabhūpana sutegeṁ
budaṁ manade bhāvisutuṁ tanagāḷda dēsamuḷḷanitaṟoḷelliyuṁ negarda peṁ
pina bhāgaladēviyāṇe gōsane naḍedappudinnumene lakṣmane satya
da mēre lōkadoḷ . Ātana maidunanamaḷakhyātaṁ kalikālakarṇna
nīvara dēvaṁ dūtaripunṛpativijayaśrītiḷakaṁ māḷabhūpanaṁga
jarūpa . Enisida mahāsāmantaṁ māḷabhūpana prasiddha vaṁśaja
reṁtappareṁdaḍe . kēḷiṁ satyāśrayabhūpāḷakanalpaḍedonalte sā
maṁtikeyaṁ māḷaparājaṁ bhāṇasu sūḷevaḷike gandagajada sāha
ṇaminitaṁ . Anavaratadānakānīnanenaljayasiṁhadēvaniṁdā
havamallaninituṁ jasada peṁpina maneyene sale negardanalte mā
ḷaparāja . Ā māḷanṛpana tanayaṁ sāmantaṁ cakriyalli gajasāha
ṇi saṁngrāmadhanaṁjayanavanīsīmāparyantakīrtti kali muṭṭarasa .
śaraṇendāsege vandarātinṛparaṁ kāruṇyadiṁ kāvanī naralōkaṁ taṁ
bēḍidoḍe darppōpannamūrttivantāṁparibhūpāḷaranājiraṁgadoḷagurvvi
ppannegaṁ kolvaneṁdiradī dhāriṇi kūḍe baṇnisutamirkkummuṭṭabhūpāḷa
na . Antenisida muṭṭanṛpana kānte mahāsati viḷāsavati patihi
teyeṁdindu guṇastutigeyvudu saṁta mattikabbarasi The continuation is built in.
Digital edition of SII 18.82 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
